Network error — check your connection or API configuration.
Share your pay link or QR. Buyers pay USDC on Base; funds go to the wallet on the resource, and they land on your success page for that slug.
Create a link to show the URL and QR.
QR code preview; create a payment link to show your live code.
builds a slug from your label; each click picks a new name and never repeats one you already used here in this session.
Add your Base wallet above, then create a link — the QR uses the saved resource from the API. Leave slug empty for a random id, or choose one (letters, digits, hyphens).
USDC on Base will be sent here
Webhook-driven status only—do not treat as x402 attempt truth.
Older flow using <mono1>/api/payment-session</mono1>. Unrelated to x402 payment attempts; shown only when <mono2>sessionId</mono2> is present.

Send {{amount}} {{currency}} on Base to the recipient for this link. The server detects USDC on Base automatically when you open the status page; use this form only if you need to force verification with a known transaction hash (e.g. from MetaMask or a block explorer).
This payment link is invalid or no longer available.
This payment link does not match this product.
Card checkout is coming soon—no charge yet.
With <mono>X402_MOCK_VERIFY=true</mono> on the worker, mock verify skips the chain (not for production).
After you send USDC on Base, open payment status. You can tap Pay on Base or Pay on MetaMask again if you need to reopen your wallet.
Could not load this payment. Check your connection and try again.
MetaMask pay isn’t available for this resource (check payout address and USDC on Base).
Open pay page without this link
Paste the transaction hash from your wallet or block explorer.
Pay on Base isn’t available for this resource (check payout address and USDC on Base).
Missing payment slug in the URL.
Status updates use <mono>GET /api/payment-attempt/:id</mono>, which re-checks the chain while the attempt is unpaid.

Pay on Base opens Coinbase Wallet or the Base app. Pay on MetaMask opens the MetaMask app. USDC on Base is detected automatically when you check payment status—use Advanced only if you need to paste a transaction hash.
That does not look like a valid transaction hash (expected 0x followed by 64 hex characters).
Wallet links are unavailable (no payout address on Base for this resource). Use Advanced to verify with a transaction hash.
Truth comes from <mono>GET /api/payment-attempt/:id</mono> only. Query-string flags are not used as payment proof.
This page needs an <mono1>attemptId</mono1> from the x402 flow (e.g. <mono2>/success/demo-001?attemptId=…</mono2>). Without it, we cannot show verified payment status.
Route slug <slug1>{{routeSlug}}</slug1> does not match attempt slug <slug2>{{attemptSlug}}</slug2>. Trust the attempt row below.
Checking your payment attempt with the server…
The attempt was just created and is not ready for payment yet.
Status is reported by the worker. If this looks wrong, refresh or contact support.
We could not read this attempt from the worker. Check the link or try again.
This attempt is no longer valid. Create a new attempt from the pay page.
This attempt did not complete successfully. Start a new payment from the pay page if you still need access.
Your payment was confirmed and this attempt is marked paid.
This page checks the server every few seconds. Complete the transfer from the pay page, or use Advanced there if you need to submit a transaction hash.
This page checks the server every few seconds. Complete the transfer or wait for confirmation.
Only the digits 0–9 and letters a–f are allowed after 0x.
Wallet address must be 42 characters (0x plus 40 hexadecimal digits).
Enter the wallet address where you want to get paid.
